extra_slides.purpose: 릴스 시작 2초 이내 시선 고정용 충격 훅
extra_slides.prompt: Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. ULTRA BOLD typography hook. Very dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin all sides. Center: massive bold white text '머리 부딪혔을 때' top line, huge red #E63946 bold text '119? 병원? 집?' bottom line, ultra compact spacing. Top-right small: '소아과언니' white. Bottom: tiny white caption '3초 안에 판단하세요'. Minimal design, maximum impact, emergency alert mood, no illustrations, pure typographic shock.

extra_slides.purpose: 즉시 119 상황을 실사로 보여주는 긴박한 장면
extra_slides.prompt: Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. REAL PHOTO style closeup. Toddler lying motionless on floor, eyes closed, parent's hand gently checking consciousness, blurred emergency phone 119 visible in background. Urgent mood, shallow depth of field, dramatic natural lighting from side, photorealistic, high detail on hand and child's face, dark navy vignette edges #0D1B2A, no text overlay, pure documentary emergency moment. Korean baby, East Asian facial features, chubby cheeks; Korean mother/father, East Asian appearance, Korean parent
